category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Gotify-CLI as a client for pushing messages to gotify/server.
source_facts.description says this is a command-line interface for pushing messages to gotify/server.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Gotify-CLI.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for the CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/gotify/cli; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and repository topics identify cli, gotify, and push-notifications.
source_facts.description identifies a CLI for pushing messages.
